steps.title: Compute the y-intercept
steps.content: $f(0)=(-2)(1)+21=19$, so the intercept is $(0,19)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, $(0, 19)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
